message.content: YES. The filmstrip/media preview area shows small light-colored dots (resembling sprocket holes) arranged in horizontal rows ABOVE and BELOW the central video thumbnail. The dots are white or light gray against a dark background, mimicking physical film strip perforations. The central video thumbnail itself displays a video preview (showing a library/stacked shelves with a play button overlay) with a dark, moody color scheme (blues and dark tones), and the surrounding filmstrip has these decorative sprocket-like dots framing the video.
